creator: bbtruk@users.sourceforge.net
text:
Created attachment 159900
Patch to fix build

After recent updates to editors/lazarus port, x11-fm/doublecmd port is failing to build because of missing dependency for the WFX_FTP option. The attached patch fixes it.

Patch tested using Poudriere and the following combinations:
doublecmd_SET=GTK2 WFX_FTP (default options)

doublecmd_SET=QT4
doublecmd_UNSET=GTK2 WFX_FTP

doublecmd_SET=QT4
doublecmd_UNSET=GTK2

doublecmd_UNSET=WFX_FTP


No version bumped because currently it is failing to build.
